name: Apex Phone 15 Pro
description: Next-generation flagship smartphone with titanium chassis, 120Hz Super Retina display, and triple camera system.

name: Nova Book Ultra 16
description: Ultra-thin creator laptop powered by 14-core processor, 32GB RAM, OLED touch display, and 18-hour battery life.

name: SonicPulse Wireless ANC Headphones
description: Premium over-ear noise-canceling headphones with spatial audio, high-res drivers, and ultra-soft memory foam pads.

name: ChronoSync Pro Smartwatch
description: Advanced health tracking smartwatch featuring ECG monitoring, dual-band GPS, AMOLED display, and 7-day battery.

name: PixelLite 8a Smartphone
description: Budget-friendly smartphone with AI photography capabilities, clean OS experience, and all-day intelligent battery.

name: Titan Gaming Laptop 17
description: Extreme performance gaming laptop with RTX 4080 GPU, 240Hz display, mechanical keyboard, and liquid cooling tech.

name: AirFlow True Wireless Earbuds
description: Compact wireless in-ear earbuds with active noise cancellation, IPX7 water resistance, and wireless charging case.

name: FitPulse Active Band 5
description: Lightweight fitness tracker with continuous SpO2 monitoring, sleep tracking, 50m water resistance, and 14-day battery.

name: Horizon Foldable Phone Z
description: Innovative dual-screen foldable smartphone that expands into a 7.6-inch tablet view with stylus support.

name: Zenith SlimBook 14
description: Ultraportable everyday laptop featuring full aluminum unibody, anti-glare IPS screen, and fast USB-C power delivery.

name: StudioMonitor HD Studio Headphones
description: Professional open-back studio reference headphones engineered for mixing, mastering, and critical listening.

name: RuggedX Outdoor Smartwatch
description: Military-grade durable outdoor smartwatch with solar charging lens, topographic maps, and barometer sensor.
